Mdtero Account

Connect email, check balance and quota, and tune helper-first browser preferences.

EElsevier arXarXiv PMCPMC RxbioRxiv PLPLOS

Configure the helper-first browser surface for publisher-page capture, preprints, and account-linked downloads.

Browser-assisted sources use the same shared matrix, but you still need the article page open locally when Mdtero asks for browser capture.

Connector keys

Only fill the keys you actually need. Everything stays on your own machine.

Get your API key to unlock the official Elsevier route.

Get your Springer Nature API key for local OA XML retrieval.

Advanced

Why Mdtero asks for these permissions

`tabs` lets the extension reuse or open supported paper pages for local capture.

`downloads` saves Markdown files, translations, fallback ZIPs, and source files back to your own machine.

`nativeMessaging` connects the extension to your local Mdtero helper for browser-assisted acquisition.

Publisher host permissions stay limited to supported scholarly sites and the Mdtero / publisher APIs already used by the product.

Document History

Downloads from your history are always free.
